title: Monday Forms | Date Range feature missing possibility to select years
excerpt:
When selecting a date range in a Monday Form, it is not possible to select a year directly and user has to click on the arrow to go from one month to the other until they reach the desired year. 
To select dates in 2040 …

posts.author: PTAJ (AJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
When selecting a date range in a Monday Form, it is not possible to select a year directly and user has to click on the arrow to go from one month to the other until they reach the desired year.

To select dates in 2040 for example, you have to click on the arrow for a good 5 minutes…

Please add the possibility to select the year directly (basic date range feature everywhere else)

Thank you

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PTAJ,

We feel your frustration! This used to drive us nuts too.
monday.com make improvements all the time and the date column is no exception.
I don’t know how long it’s been available, but there is a drop-down inside the date selection within a form, and it allows you to move through the years much faster - I got to 2040 in seconds!

If yours doesn’t look like that, give your local monday rep a shout or email support@monday.com and ask why/if yours can be updated!

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
